analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov announces that Russia and Serbia will sign an intergovernmental agreement on cooperation against terrorism, providing a legal framework for practical projects. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no mention of the West or moral judgments. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Implicitly aligns with non-Western cooperation and building frameworks outside Western structures by highlighting bilateral Russia-Serbia cooperation and practical projects; suggests alternative multilateralism/sovereignty-based cooperation. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Yes; the framing of a "pivotal" agreement to combat terrorism and provide a solid legal basis for practical cooperation portrays Russia as a constructive, reliable partner promoting security. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No claim of superiority or leadership achievements. RU6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: RU2 and RU3 are promoted.
